caption: A man with a short beard and shaved sides of his head is recording in a studio against a black acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small logo with the text "Stay Humble" and "MIND POWR". He is positioned in front of a silver professional microphone held by a black shock mount. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts from a subtle smile with closed eyes to a wider, open-mouthed laugh, before settling into a smirk and finally looking off to his left with a playful grin. His head tilts slightly as he reacts, while his position relative to the microphone and the background remains constant.
